heroHeadline: US-Iran Ceasefire Expires with No Deal — Trump Threatens to Bomb Iranian Power Plants
heroSubtitle: The fragile two-week US-Iran ceasefire expired April 21 with no agreement, as a second round of Islamabad talks ended after 21 hours with Iran refusing to send delegates. Trump threatened to destroy Iranian power plants and bridges, stating US forces were 'raring to go,' while WTI crude rose toward $93–95/barrel on renewed strike risk.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all US-based Watchboard trackers.
